name: Narco Strike
short_description: Action game based on narco war, in which you take different perspectives of it.
detailed_description:
The drug war has condemned you, you have been caught by the police and now you must face all those who are against you.

Action game based narco war, in which you take different roles as a drug lord to face cartel war.


Features:

-Chapter based story: Advance in story in different episodes.

-Dynamic levels: Find alternative exits or different way to escape and reach your homeland.

-Roleplaying: Find items to help you progress in game.

-Action combat: Use multiple guns and explosives to face your enemies.
